author: Avalon Community Servers <manager@avaloncs.net>
name: GitHub Actions Runner
description: Self-hosted GitHub Actions runner (non-root, auto-register, auto-start).
startup: su -s /bin/bash container -c 'cd /home/container/actions-runner && if [ ! -f .runner ]; then ./config.sh --unattended --url "$REPO_URL" --token "$REG_TOKEN" --work _work --replace; fi && exec ./run.sh'

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

[ -z "${REPO_URL:-}" ] && echo "REPO_URL is required" && exit 1
[ -z "${REG_TOKEN:-}" ] && echo "REG_TOKEN is required" && exit 1

RUNNER_VERSION="2.329.0"
RUNNER_SHA256="194f1e1e4bd02f80b7e9633fc546084d8d4e19f3928a324d512ea53430102e1d"

mkdir -p /mnt/server/actions-runner
cd /mnt/server/actions-runner

curl -fsSL -o runner.tar.gz https://github.com/actions/runner/releases/download/v${RUNNER_VERSION}/actions-runner-linux-x64-${RUNNER_VERSION}.tar.gz
echo "${RUNNER_SHA256}  runner.tar.gz" | sha256sum -c -

tar xzf runner.tar.gz
chown -R container:container /mnt/server/actions-runner
